title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds Digital Deluxe Edition
description:
Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds Digital Deluxe Edition
Included Contents:

This bundle includes:
• Base game ​
• Season Pass:

Sonic Prime Character Pack - Rusty Rose, Tails Nine, Knuckles the Dread (Available at launch)

6 DLC Packs, which include guest characters, vehicles, tracks, emotes, and more from some of your favorite pop culture franchises.

Additional content will be released sequentially after the game is released.

Please check the official website for product details and release schedule.

Drift Across Dimensions

Speed to victory solo or as a team in a variety of offline and online modes and compete against players from around the world. Build the ultimate vehicle to match your racing style, unlock gadgets to gain the upper hand, and unleash power-up items to bring home the win!

Ready, Set, Warp!

Race across 24 tracks and warp to 15 CrossWorlds with Travel Rings, a unique gameplay mechanic that transports the iconic characters from the Sonic and SEGA universes into new dimensions. Use unpredictability to your advantage as you change the landscape of each race!

Race With the Best!

Choose from 23 iconic Sonic characters, the largest roster of any Sonic racing game!

Make It Yours

Mix and match between 45 unique original vehicles and 70 different gadgets to trick out your ride, level up your kart, and create the ultimate machine to match your racing style.
